nodes.description: name: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Krapow) with Rice | short_description: Aromatic Thai stir-fry of ground chicken with holy basil, chilies, and garlic served over jasmine rice with a fried egg on top. | m
nodes.premise: Meal: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Krapow) with Rice - name: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Krapow) with Rice | short_description: Aromatic Thai stir-fry of ground chicken with holy basil, chilies, and garlic served over jasmine rice with a fried egg on top. | meal_suggestion: Stir-fry ground chicken with garlic, Thai chilies, and fish sauce until cooked, then toss in a generous handful of holy basil leaves. Serve over steamed jasmine rice topped with a crispy fried egg. Adjust chili to taste; pair with a side of cucumber slices to cool the palate. | nutrition_note: Lean ground chicken provides protein with less fat than other meats; basil offers antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds; chilies may boost metabolism. Fish sauce is high in sodium — use measured amounts. Jasmine rice provides quick-digesting carbs; the fried egg adds extra protein and healthy fats.

nodes.name: Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi
nodes.description: name: Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi | short_description: Pan-seared salmon fillet glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger. |
nodes.premise: Meal: Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi - name: Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi | short_description: Pan-seared salmon fillet glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger. | meal_suggestion: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down until crispy, then glaze with a mix of soy sauce, mirin, and a touch of sugar. Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori. | nutrition_note: Salmon is rich in omega-3 fatty acids supporting heart and brain health; broccoli provides fiber, vitamin C, and sulforaphane; rice offers sustained energy. Teriyaki glaze contains sodium and sugar — make homemade to control amounts. Pickled ginger aids digestion.

nodes.name: Korean Bibimbap Bowl
nodes.description: name: Korean Bibimbap Bowl | short_description: A colorful Korean rice bowl topped with sautéed vegetables, seasoned beef, a fried egg, and spicy gochujang sauce — balanced and vibrant. | meal_suggest
nodes.premise: Meal: Korean Bibimbap Bowl - name: Korean Bibimbap Bowl | short_description: A colorful Korean rice bowl topped with sautéed vegetables, seasoned beef, a fried egg, and spicy gochujang sauce — balanced and vibrant. | meal_suggestion: Arrange sautéed spinach, bean sprouts, carrots, and zucchini over steamed rice. Top with seasoned ground beef and a sunny-side-up egg. Serve with gochujang (Korean chili paste) mixed with sesame oil on the side. Mix everything together before eating for the best flavor. | nutrition_note: A well-rounded meal with protein from beef and egg, fiber and vitamins from assorted vegetables, and energy from rice. Gochujang contains capsaicin which may aid metabolism. Moderate in calories; control portions of rice and gochujang to manage carbs and sodium.
